app.confirmNewTimeline: Start a new timeline? The current timeline will be preserved, and the world will restart from initial state.
app.defaultEndTransition: Night falls, and the day's bustle fades to silence...
app.defaultStartTransitionOpen: The scene shifts quietly to a new act

create.subtitle: Describe the world you want to create. GeoPixel will design the landscape, craft the mechanics, create characters that think for themselves, and bring everything to life.
create.promptPlaceholder: A cozy mountain village in autumn, with a blacksmith, a tea house owner, a wandering monk and a curious child...
create.emptyError: Please describe the world you want to create.
create.conflictError: A world is already being generated. You can attach to the running job to follow its progress.
create.switchFailed: World was generated but switching failed: {{error}}
create.phase1Hint: LLM is dreaming up regions, characters and lore.
create.phase2Hint: Image model paints the world; vision model annotates it.
create.phase3Hint: Sprite sheets are generated and cleaned up.
create.phase4Hint: Configs, navigation points and runtime are assembled.
create.tipRunning: You can leave this tab open or close it — generation runs on the server and resumes when you come back.
create.tipSwitching: Switching you into the new world…
create.sampleWorldsOr: or skip creating — try a ready-made world
create.sampleWorldsHint: These sample worlds are pre-built and ready to explore right away.

topbar.noReplayData: No tick data to replay yet
topbar.noReplayDataAlert: The current timeline has no data yet. Run the simulation for a while first!
topbar.godModeTitle: Broadcast events or implant memories into characters
topbar.sandboxChatTitle: Pull a character out for a private chat (no memory, no world impact)
topbar.tickTitle: Dev-only tick granularity; creates a new timeline
topbar.confirmSwitchTimeline: Switch to this timeline? The page will reload.
topbar.confirmSwitchTickGranularity: Switch tick granularity to {{value}} minutes? This will create a new timeline and reload the page.
topbar.confirmSwitchWorld: Switch to "{{name}}"? The page will reload.

mapControls.hintLine1: Drag to pan, scroll to zoom, click minimap to jump.
mapControls.hintLine2: Click a character for details. Hit Play above to start the simulation.

god.title: God Mode
god.subtitle: Inject events or memories into the world. Characters will perceive these changes via LLM.
god.broadcastPlaceholder: e.g. A sudden downpour drenches the entire area…
god.broadcastSuccess: Broadcasted to {{count}} characters, takes effect next tick
god.whisperPlaceholder: e.g. You vaguely recall seeing a familiar figure at the dock three days ago…
god.whisperHint: Start with "you" — the character will perceive it as their own memory.
god.presetRainContent: A sudden downpour drenches the area — rain hammers the rooftops.
god.presetBlackoutContent: The entire area plunges into darkness — a blackout. Only scattered candles and phone screens glow.
god.presetStrangerContent: An unknown stranger appears at the door, seemingly asking around about something.
god.presetLetterContent: Someone finds an unsigned letter on the table, its contents unsettling.
god.presetWindContent: A fierce wind sweeps through, scattering objects everywhere.
god.presetBirdsContent: A flock of dark birds circles overhead, lingering as if watching something.

sandbox.title: Sandbox Chat
sandbox.subtitle: No memory, no world impact — pull a character out for a private conversation.
sandbox.identityPlaceholder: Leave empty = they don't know who you are; or write: a visitor claiming to be from the future…
sandbox.hint: This conversation is fully isolated from the main simulation: no memories generated, no character behavior affected. Session is destroyed on close.
sandbox.emptyChat: (Type a message and hit Send to begin)
sandbox.sessionExpired: This chat session has expired. Please start a new one.
sandbox.presetOldFriendVal: An old friend they haven't seen in a long time.
sandbox.presetReporterVal: A reporter working on a story, asking questions.
sandbox.presetStrangerVal: A stranger met by chance on the street.
sandbox.presetFutureSelfVal: Someone claiming to be their future self — not sure if real.
sandbox.presetEnemyVal: Someone from an opposing faction, approaching with unclear motives.

manager.title: Manage Worlds & Timelines
manager.cannotDeleteActiveTimeline: Cannot delete the currently active timeline. Switch to another timeline first.
manager.confirmDeleteTimeline: Delete timeline "{{id}}"? This cannot be undone.
manager.cannotDeleteActiveWorld: Cannot delete the currently active world. Switch to another world first.
manager.confirmDeleteWorld: Permanently delete world "{{name}}" and all its timelines? This cannot be undone.
